subcodes.first_line: O servant named Karím, render thanks unto God, thy Lord, inasmuch as He hath graciously prevented thy countenance from turning unto any save Him and hath purified thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد قبل کریم فاشکر الله ربک بما کرم وجهک عن التوجه الی غیره و طهرک عن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @law of pilgrimage, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
